title: App crashes every time I switch projects
review: I've been using this app for three months and it's become completely unusable. Every single time I switch between projects the app just crashes to the home screen. I lose all my unsaved work. This started with version 2.4 and I've reported it twice now with no fix.
author: frustrated_pm_sarah

title: Black screen on launch after update
review: Updated to 2.4 yesterday and now the app just shows a black screen for about 30 seconds before loading. Sometimes it never loads and I have to force close. My team is complaining constantly.
author: markdevteam

title: Crashes when switching projects - losing all my work
review: This bug is destroying my productivity. Mid-task I switch to another project and boom - crash. No autosave. Three hours of planning gone. Please fix this urgently.
author: projectlead_NYC

title: Best project management app on the store
review: Absolutely love the collaboration features and the timeline view. The new dashboard is beautiful. My entire team switched from Asana and we haven't looked back. Keep up the great work.
author: happy_team_lead

title: Dashboard loads incredibly slowly now
review: The dashboard used to load in under two seconds. Now it takes 12 seconds or more. I have 47 projects and the load time scales with the number of projects. It's making daily standups awkward.
author: ops_manager_lisa

title: Project switch crash is a showstopper
review: Cannot believe this wasn't caught in QA. Switching projects causes an immediate crash 100% of the time on my iPhone 15 Pro. Version 2.3.9 was perfect. Please roll back.
author: iphone_user_james

title: Export to CSV just silently fails
review: Tried to export my task list to CSV for a board meeting. The export button shows a loading spinner for a few seconds then nothing happens. No file
date: no error message. Had to manually copy everything.

title: Great app but the black screen bug is concerning
review: Love the core functionality and the Gantt chart view is unmatched. But since the 2.4 update I get a black screen on cold start about half the time. Hoping for a quick fix.
author: gantt_fan_toronto

title: Notifications arrive 45 minutes late on iPhone
review: Push notifications are completely broken. I get project update alerts 45 minutes after they were sent. In a fast-moving team this makes the app useless for real-time coordination.
author: realtime_required

title: No onboarding for new team members - very confusing
review: I added three new people to our workspace and they had absolutely no idea where to start. No getting started guide
version: no tooltips. They gave up and asked me to set everything up for them.

title: App crashes on project switch - third report
review: I've submitted two support tickets and left two reviews. The project switch crash is still there in 2.4.1. This is a regression from 2.3.9. My entire team is affected. We're evaluating alternatives.
author: enterprise_customer_raj

title: Dashboard takes forever to load with many projects
review: We have an enterprise account with 200+ projects. The dashboard is now completely unusable - loading spinner for 25 seconds every time. The app was snappy before the 2.4 release.
author: enterprise_ops_team

title: Excellent task management and team collaboration
review: The subtask nesting and dependency tracking is the best I've seen in any project app. Our engineering team loves the GitHub integration. Five stars without hesitation.
author: eng_manager_dublin

title: Black screen every morning when I open the app
review: Every morning
date: first launch of the day: black screen for 40 seconds. If I force close and reopen it usually works. This is not acceptable for a productivity app I rely on daily.

title: CSV export doesn't work at all
review: The export feature is completely broken. I tried exporting tasks
version: and the full project view. None of them produce a file. The spinner spins and then nothing. Please fix - I need this for reporting.

title: Notifications are always late - makes app pointless for alerts
review: Our team relies on push notifications to know when tasks are updated. They're consistently arriving 30 to 60 minutes late. Real-time collaboration is impossible like this.
author: collab_user_berlin

title: Love this app but please fix the crash on project switch
review: Five stars for features
date: two stars for stability since 2.4. The core experience is amazing but I can't recommend it to anyone right now because of the crash. Please push a hotfix.

title: New user experience is terrible - no guidance whatsoever
review: Signed up for a team account
version: and we all stared at a blank workspace with no idea what to do next. No welcome screen
author: no setup wizard
column8: no sample project. Very disappointing first impression.

title: Dashboard performance is now terrible for large workspaces
review: Before 2.4 the dashboard was instant. Now I wait 10 to 15 seconds every time I open the app. I have 80 projects. The old behaviour was much better. Performance regression is real.
author: power_user_stockholm

title: The timeline view and dependency tracking are world class
review: Switched from Monday.com six months ago and never looked back. The timeline visualization is stunning
version: and the customer support is responsive. A genuinely great product.
